name: Bloated
description: Days dead and swollen tight with gas, skin drawn shiny over the swell. Slow, easy to outpace — and a terrible thing to put down where you are standing.
signature: distended and glistening, taut with gas — best not burst up close
notes: FR-CBT-07 (T46). No state-machine tag — it is walker-paced; its teeth are in combat (enemy.bloated: burstInfection). Killing it at your node, by blow or by shot, sprays an infectious wound (a bad thing to do up close), so you learn to slip past it. Human-only canon: a corpse gone to rot, not an animal.
